blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
